meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: ZooData
products.tagline: The data layer for AI agents
products.summaryZh: AI智能体的数据层
products.descriptionZh:
ZooData 可将任意 URL 转换为智能体可用的 JSON 格式，让 AI 智能体直接处理结构化数据，而非原始 HTML 或臃肿的 Markdown。节省约 75% 的 LLM 令牌消耗，仅需为实际使用的字段付费，无需额外消耗提取额度。

除数据提取外，ZooData 还为智能体提供预分析的电商情报——涵盖竞品、市场、流量及消费者洞察——现已支持 Amazon 和 TikTok 实时数据。提供 API、CLI 及 MCP 服务器。免费获取 1,000 积分，无需绑定银行卡即可开始使用。
products.description: ZooData turns any URL into agent-ready JSON, so AI agents can work with structured data instead of raw HTML or bloated markdown. Use ~75% fewer LLM tokens, pay only for the fields you use, and skip extra extraction credits.Beyond extraction, ZooData gives agents pre-analyzed e-commerce intelligence — competitor, market, traffic, and consumer insights — live for Amazon and TikTok. API, CLI, and MCP server included. Start with 1,000 free credits, no card required.

products.name: Clark
products.tagline: An AI coworker with its own cloud computer
products.summaryZh: 自带云电脑的AI同事
products.descriptionZh: Clark 是一款自带云端计算机的AI同事——包含浏览器、终端、文件和代码。交给它一个实际任务，关闭标签页，回来时就能看到完成的工作：广泛且附有来源的研究报告、网站、电子表格、演示文稿、审计报告或经过测试的代码。它能将任务分派给多个并行专家，按计划运行，并返回附带证据的成果物。你可以在网页或移动端使用Clark，通过Clark Code在真实代码仓库中工作，或通过兼容OpenAI的API嵌入该智能体。
products.description: Clark is an AI coworker with its own cloud computer - browser, terminal, files, and code. Hand it a real task, close the tab, and come back to finished work: wide, sourced research; websites; spreadsheets; decks; audits; or tested code. It can fan work out to parallel specialists, run on a schedule, and return artifacts with the evidence behind them. Use Clark on web or mobile, work in real repositories with Clark Code, or embed the agent through an OpenAI-compatible API.

products.name: LiveDemo
products.tagline: Open-source alternative to Storylane, Navattic, and Arcade
products.summaryZh: Storylane、Navattic 和 Arcade 的开源替代品
products.descriptionZh: 几分钟内创建交互式产品演示。捕捉任意工作流程，添加AI配音和个性化文本，然后以链接、嵌入、GIF或视频形式分享，同时追踪互动情况并在网站、文档和销售推广中收集潜在客户。
products.description: Create interactive product demos in minutes. Capture any workflow, add AI voiceovers and personalized text, then share it as a link, embed, GIF, or video while tracking engagement and collecting leads across your website, docs, and sales outreach.

products.name: Mirage
products.tagline: Turn your SaaS into a clickable demo in 90 seconds.
products.summaryZh: 将你的SaaS产品在90秒内转化为可点击的演示。
products.descriptionZh: 大多数产品演示要么是没人看完的40MB视频，要么是每月500美元、自筹资金创业者无法证明其价值的工具。Mirage提供了第三种选择：一键捕捉真实应用，添加引导式热点，约90秒内发布可嵌入任何地方的交互式演示。追踪浏览、完成率和每一步的流失情况，从而精准修复问题而非盲目猜测。适用于落地页、Product Hunt发布和引导邮件。首个演示永久免费。
products.description: Most product demos are a 40MB video nobody finishes or a $500/mo tool no bootstrapper can justify. Mirage is the third option: capture your real app in one click, add guided hotspots, and publish a clickable demo you can embed anywhere in ~90 seconds. Track views, completions, and per step drop-off so you fix the leak instead of guessing. Perfect for landing pages, PH launches, and onboarding emails. First demo is free forever.

products.name: OpenMarkdown
products.tagline: A markdown editor you and your agent co-edit
products.summaryZh: 你和你的智能体共同编辑的Markdown编辑器
products.descriptionZh: 一款快速轻量的Markdown编辑器，可即时打开任意`.md`文件。你的智能体通过CLI、智能体插件和MCP，与你共同读写和编辑同一文件。本地优先：无需账户、无遥测数据，你的文件始终保留在本地磁盘。
products.description: A fast, light markdown editor that opens any `.md` file instantly. Your agent reads, writes, and co-edits the same file you're in — through a CLI, an agent plugin, and MCP. Local-first: no account, no telemetry, your files never leave your disk.

products.name: Acebuilder
products.tagline: Build landing pages with Aceternity UI
products.summaryZh: 使用 Aceternity UI 构建着陆页
products.descriptionZh: Acebuilder 是 Aceternity UI 团队推出的一款 AI 网站构建工具。它并非从零生成通用布局，而是基于 Aceternity 实际的 Pro 模板和组件库——你可以导入完整页面或单个模块，然后通过与智能体对话来调整文案、布局和结构。无需离开对话即可生成图片。对任意区域运行设计“技能”，让智能体摆脱通用填充，走向更精准的布局。将代码导出为压缩包。你所构建的内容归你所有。
products.description: Acebuilder is an AI website builder from the team behind Aceternity UI. Instead of generating generic layouts from scratch, it pulls from Aceternity's actual Pro template and component library — you import a full page or a single block, then reshape the copy, layout, and structure by chatting with the agent. Generate images without leaving the chat. Run design "skills" on any section to push the agent past generic filler toward sharper layout. Export your code as a zip. You own what you build.

products.name: DocuSmart AI
products.tagline: Turning fragmented knowledge into one simple system
products.summaryZh: 将零散的知识整合为一个简洁的系统
products.descriptionZh: DocuSmart AI 让你用自然语言搜索所有内部文档——涵盖 Google Drive、SharePoint、Dropbox 等平台——只需一个入口。无需迁移、无需重新整理、无需培训。只需提问，即可获得答案。专为被分散在过多系统中的文档所困扰的非营利组织和中小企业打造。我们正在寻找早期用户，如果文档混乱正在消耗你团队的时间，我们期待你的反馈。
products.description: DocuSmart AI lets you search all your internal documents using plain English — across Google Drive, SharePoint, Dropbox and more — from one place. No migration, no reorganising, no training required. Just ask a question and get the answer. Built for nonprofits and SMEs who are drowning in documents spread across too many systems. We're looking for early adopters, if document chaos costs your team time, we'd love to hear from you.

products.name: AgentGrid
products.tagline: Your AI agents team, terminals, notes: one infinite canvas
products.summaryZh: 你的AI智能体团队、终端、笔记：一个无限画布
products.descriptionZh: 你的AI编程代理，统一呈现在一张持久化的无限画布上。可生成基于角色的工作节点（构建者、质量检查员、审查员、运维人员），由编排器运行构建、审查、修复、验证循环，而你负责把控方向。终端、浏览器、笔记和Git与代理并列显示，因此查看AI状态只需一瞥，无需反复询问。整个工作区在重启后持续保留：每个代理、会话和面板都会恢复到你离开时的状态。支持本地运行Claude Code和Codex。适用于macOS、Linux和Windows。
products.description: Your AI coding agents, visible on one persistent infinite canvas. Spawn role-based workers (builder, QA, reviewer, devops) and an orchestrator runs the build, review, fix, validate loop while you steer. Terminals, browsers, notes and git live beside your agents, so checking on your AI is a glance, not an interrogation. Your whole workspace persists across restarts: every agent, session and pane restored where you left it. Works with Claude Code and Codex, locally. macOS, Linux and Windows.

products.name: LeadJarvis
products.tagline: Turn Every Event Interaction Into Qualified Leads Instantly!
products.summaryZh: 将每一次活动互动瞬间转化为合格线索！
products.descriptionZh: LeadJarvis 即时将每张活动名片扫描转化为有效对话，确保不遗漏任何商机。📇 扫描名片（支持20+种语言）🔍 补充公司及个人档案信息💬 20秒内通过WhatsApp和邮件发送个性化跟进🤖 AI全天候筛选商机，自主处理大部分对话，无需人工介入🙋 必要时转接至人工客服🔗 直接同步至HubSpot、Zoho等系统。别再因跟进迟缓流失商机——在客户离场前就开启对话！
products.description: LeadJarvis instantly converts every event business card scan into a qualified conversation, ensuring no lead is lost. 📇 Scan cards (20+languages) 🔍 Enrich with company + person profile 💬 Personalized outreach on WhatsApp and Email within 20s 🤖 AI qualifies leads 24/7 handling most conversations without human intervention 🙋 Hands off to human rep when needed 🔗 Synced straight into HubSpot, Zoho Stop losing leads to slow follow-up, start the conversation even before they leave the hallway!

products.name: Fiftycore
products.tagline: Stop Guessing Start Building
products.summaryZh: 停止猜测，开始构建
products.descriptionZh: 1. 市场验证——在投入前确认你的想法是否具备真实需求。2. 现实模拟器——在构建前预见创业项目的成功、停滞或失败。3. 尽职调查深度分析——按需提供投资者级别的风险评估。4. 执行方案——每日任务与AI指导，确保你永不停滞。5. 创始人智能图谱——绘制你的创业项目及作为创始人的你。
products.description: 1. Market Validation - Know if your idea has real demand before committing. 2. Reality Simulator - See your startup's success, stagnation, or failure before building. 3. Due Diligence Deep Dive - Investor-grade risk analysis on demand. 4. Execution Protocol - Daily tasks + AI mentorship so you never stall. 5. Founder Intelligence Graph - Maps your startup and you as a founder.

products.name: Dictately
products.tagline: Hold a key, talk — clean text in any Mac app
products.summaryZh: 按住按键，说话——在任何Mac应用中清除文本
products.descriptionZh: macOS 上最快、最准确的语音听写。自然说话，获得完美文本。支持 99 种以上语言、智能格式化和上下文感知 AI。
products.description: The fastest, most accurate voice dictation for macOS. Speak naturally, get perfect text. 99+ languages, smart formatting, context-aware AI.

products.name: Klutter AI
products.tagline: AI powered expense tracker
products.summaryZh: AI 驱动的费用追踪器
products.descriptionZh: 大多数金融应用帮你记录支出。Klutter帮你理解财务状况。自动从收据、短信和手动输入中获取交易记录。构建预算、探索消费模式、获取AI驱动的洞察，并将整个财务生活集中管理。无论是追踪日常开销、规划月度预算，还是单纯想更清晰地掌握财务状况，Klutter都能去除冗余信息，让你专注于做出更明智的决策。
products.description: Most finance apps help you record expenses. Klutter helps you understand your money. Automatically capture transactions from receipts, SMS, and manual entries. Build budgets, explore spending patterns, receive AI-powered insights, and keep your entire financial life organized in one place. Whether you're tracking daily expenses, planning monthly budgets, or simply trying to gain better financial clarity, Klutter removes the clutter so you can focus on making better decisions.

products.name: Postfleet
products.tagline: Prompt-injection-safe email for AI agents
products.summaryZh: 面向AI代理的防提示注入邮件
products.descriptionZh: AI代理正在接入电子邮件，但原始收件箱存在攻击面：提示注入、垃圾邮件、恶意文件。Postfleet是为代理打造的邮件基础设施。每封入站消息在代理读取前都会经过验证、垃圾邮件/病毒筛查及提示注入检测，随后以解析并理解后的形式交付。出站消息具备幂等性，并支持可选的人工审批。提供6个MCP工具及REST API。期待您的反馈！
products.description: AI agents are getting email but raw inboxes are an attack surface: prompt injection, spam, malicious files. Postfleet is email infrastructure for agents. Every inbound message is verified, spam/virus-screened, and checked for prompt injection before your agent reads it, then delivered already parsed and comprehended. Outbound is idempotent with optional human approval. 6 MCP tools + a REST API. Would love your feedback!

products.name: FastDev — API generator in minutes
products.tagline: Generate FastAPI, NestJS & Go backends in minutes
products.summaryZh: 在几分钟内生成 FastAPI、NestJS 和 Go 后端
products.descriptionZh: 一个 config.yaml → 完整的后端：为 FastAPI、NestJS 或 Go Fiber 生成模型、迁移、CRUD 和认证。FastDev Studio 让你可视化设计 API，预览生成的代码，并下载可直接部署的项目。代码干净、可编辑，完全归你所有。Next.js 前端生成即将推出。
products.description: One config.yaml → full backend: models, migrations, CRUD, and auth for FastAPI, NestJS, or Go Fiber. FastDev Studio lets you design APIs visually, preview generated code, and download a ready-to-deploy project. Clean, editable code you fully own. Next.js frontend generation coming soon.

products.name: Mainichi
products.tagline: Learn Japanese, one prefecture at a time.
products.summaryZh: 按县学习日语，一次一个县。
products.descriptionZh: 通过专为长期记忆设计的间隔重复系统，学习超过20,000个日语单词。每天不到5分钟的趣味化游戏式学习——告别枯燥的教科书。Mainichi省去了闪卡的繁琐。简短、低压的学习时段融入真实生活——轻松参与一轮词汇练习，让连续打卡记录自然积累。简洁的卡片。快速的练习。真正会增长的进度条。界面隐于无形，让你专注于词汇本身。
products.description: Learn 20,000+ Japanese words with a spaced-repetition system built for long-term memory. Playful, gamified sessions under 5 minutes a day — no boring textbooks. Mainichi skips the flashcard grind. Short, low-pressure sessions that fit into a real day — show up, relax into a round of vocab, and let your streak do the rest. Clean cards. Fast sessions. A progress bar that actually fills up. The interface gets out of the way so you can focus on the words.

products.name: WX
products.tagline: An experimental synth for playable generative sound
products.summaryZh: 一款用于可演奏生成式声音的实验性合成器
products.descriptionZh: WX 是一款生成式合成器插件，通过受控随机化生成不断演变的音色。双击即可生成声音，随后使用熟悉的合成器参数、调制和内置效果进行塑形。它专为喜爱不可预测结果、同时希望声音仍具可演奏性的音乐人设计。
products.description: WX is a generative synth plugin that creates evolving patches through controlled randomization. Double-click to generate a sound, then shape it with familiar synth parameters, modulation and built-in effects. It is designed for musicians who enjoy unpredictable results but still want the sound to remain playable.

products.name: Threat Surveillance
products.tagline: A minimalist, ad-free global virus and outbreak dashboard.
products.summaryZh: 极简、无广告的全球病毒与疫情仪表盘。
products.descriptionZh: 官方公共卫生门户网站往往更新缓慢、信息分散或深埋在繁重的PDF文件中，而Outbreak Tracker则提供零冗余的全球病原体数据实时监测工具。该工具专为低带宽网络即时加载而设计，聚合了Cyclospora和Ebola等持续暴发疫情的原始时间序列指标与传播路径。完全无广告，尊重用户隐私，以纯粹、可访问的数据布局优先于编辑性噪音。
products.description: While official public health portals are often slow, fragmented, or buried inside heavy PDFs, Outbreak Tracker provides a zero-bloat, live monitoring utility for global pathogen data. Engineered to load instantly on low-bandwidth networks, it aggregates raw chronological metrics and transmission paths for ongoing spikes like Cyclospora and Ebola. It is completely ad-free, respects user privacy, and prioritizes pure, accessible data layout over editorial noise.

products.name: Grievyn
products.tagline: Create a beautiful online memorial for someone you love
products.summaryZh: 为你爱的人创建一个美丽的在线纪念页
products.descriptionZh: Grievyn帮助家庭创建精美的在线纪念空间，让照片、故事、悼词、语音致敬、蜡烛和重要人生时刻共同留存于一处永恒的场所。纪念页面可选择公开或私密分享，方便世界各地的亲友共同追忆、参与并纪念逝者的一生。
products.description: Grievyn helps families create beautiful online memorials where photos, stories, condolences, voice tributes, candles and important life moments can live together in one lasting place. Memorials can be shared publicly or privately, making it easier for friends and relatives anywhere in the world to remember, contribute and celebrate a life.

products.name: College Fit Project
products.tagline: Rankings tell you what’s prestigious; we tell you your match
products.summaryZh: 排名告诉你什么产品有名气；我们告诉你什么产品适合你。
products.descriptionZh: 找到适合你的大学——而非排名最高的。使用40多项数据因素（包括学费、录取率、校园规模、气候以及AI评估的自定义标准）构建个性化评分卡。免费开始使用。
products.description: Find the college that's right for you — not just the highest-ranked one. Build a personalized scorecard using 40+ data factors including tuition, acceptance rate, campus size, climate, and AI-evaluated custom criteria. Free to start.

products.name: Leanup
products.tagline: AI Calorie Tracker App That Makes Food Logging Effortless
products.summaryZh: AI卡路里追踪应用，让食物记录轻松自如
products.descriptionZh: 下载LeanUp，一款AI卡路里追踪应用，用于记录餐食、追踪宏量营养素、AI餐食规划、食物扫描及智能营养分析。
products.description: Download LeanUp, an AI calorie tracker app for meal logging, macro tracking, AI meal planning, food scanning, and smart nutrition insights.
